name: STOA AI Factory — Slack Interactive Handler

meta.notes:
Slack Interactive Handler for STOA AI Factory (v3 — consolidated for n8n v2).

Single Code node handles: Slack signature validation, allowlist check, routing, GitHub API calls.
Replaces multi-node v2 which used Switch v3.2 (broken in n8n v2.8.4).

Actions: approve_ticket, approve_plan, merge_pr, close_abandoned_prs.
Required env vars: SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET, GITHUB_PAT, SLACK_ADMIN_USERS, SLACK_ALLOWED_USERS.
Required n8n env: NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto,https,url,buffer, N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false.
